## LibraryRuntime.ILibraryRuntimeContext.getIngredientUsage() method

Gets detailed usage information for an ingredient.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getIngredientUsage(ingredientId: IngredientId): Result<ReadonlyArray<IIngredientUsageInfo>>;
```
